title: VLA Tutorial: Efficient Finetuning with Small Robot Batches
summary: A compact recipe for adapting large VLA models to new tasks using only a few hours of robot interaction.
body: The tutorial introduces adapter layers, curriculum scheduling, and validation hooks.
We provide practical ranges for learning rate, context window, and action horizon.
You can reproduce stable gains in task success with limited compute.
figureAlt: VLA Tutorial: Efficient Finetuning with Small Robot Batches figure
